summary: Verification pass of two fixes from iteration_2. BOTH FIXES CONFIRMED WORKING. (1) Nav overlap: at 1440x900 Settings.right=814.5, PRO.left=975.75 => gap=161px (was -31px). At 1280x800 Settings.right=766.5, PRO.left=863.75 => gap=97px. No overlap at either desktop width. Visual screenshots confirm clean layout. (2) Login with demo@ledgerly.app / demo-demo-demo successfully navigates to /dashboard. Landing hero and login helper both display 'demo@ledgerly.app' with zero occurrences of 'quickhandyquote' on either page. Smoke test: /dashboard (heading 'Estimates'), /invoices (heading 'Invoices'), /settings (heading 'Business settings') all render with no visible error elements.
critical_code_review_comments: Both open items from iteration_2 are resolved. AppShell PRO pill correctly deferred to >=1180px and app bar widened; primary nav no longer collides with the right cluster. Demo email domain is now consistently ledgerly.app across seed, login helper, and landing hero.
test_credentials: Owner demo@ledgerly.app / demo-demo-demo verified via UI login and reaches /dashboard.
seed_data_creation: None this iteration. (Previous iteration created TEST_UI_* records; not touched here.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ledgerly rebrand is fully complete. AppShell nav overlap is resolved via .hq-appbar-inner max-width 84rem + PRO pill hidden below 1180px. All prior flows verified in iteration_2 remain functional (login + core routes smoke-passed here). Preview URL: https://8a1fcd27-2686-4210-bc8e-4cecf5167001.preview.emergentagent.com
